articles.title: Can red light therapy really deliver a beauty and health glow up? Here's the science - NPR
articles.description: Wellness influencers tout the therapy's power for everything from rejuvenating skin and hair to boosting longevity. Devices sold for at-home use abound. We look at the evidence behind the hype.

articles.title: Huawei beats Apple and Samsung with new wide foldable - The Verge
articles.description: Huawei’s Pura X Max is launching in China on April 20th, in a similar ‘passport’ aspect ratio to the rumored iPhone foldable.

articles.title: Microsoft Shuts Down Outlook App For Android Users In 6 Weeks - Forbes
articles.description: Outlook Lite is no more — here's what you need to do before you lose access to your emails.

articles.title: Tested: Windows 11 just fixed slow storage management and removed a 30-year FAT32 limit - Windows Latest
articles.description: Windows 11 improves storage performance and removes FAT32 32GB limit. Disk properties now load faster in latest Insider builds.

articles.title: 8.8-inch OLED, Snapdragon 8 Gen 5: High-end compact tablet gets official launch date - Notebookcheck
articles.description: Compact tablet enthusiasts have likely been awaiting more details regarding the Oppo Pad Mini tablet. As revealed by the company, the 8.8-inch OLED tablet powered by the Snapdragon 8 Gen 5 SoC is set to see the light of day later this month.

articles.title: Rolex Teases a Seriously Surprising New Sports Watch - Gear Patrol
articles.description: Rolex released another video teasing its new watches ahead of Watches and Wonders, including a surprising sport model.
